steps.title: Identify the shared trait
steps.content: The key signal is that the notes stress the frigatebird “doesn't dive into the water for prey,” then present two different feeding methods. The similarity to emphasize is that both methods allow feeding without diving.

steps.title: Match to the correct answer
steps.content: B captures this by stating that neither method requires diving. A only addresses one method, C distinguishes rather than unifies the two methods, and D lists both without showing their commonality. This matches choice B — B is correct.
